title: Realistic Crafting
description: Players have a random chance of getting either an Enchanted, Broken or Normal Tools and Armor
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69d77c28f5c8289bbcb06a8f400f65cf208edc98_0.webp)

### **What is Realistic Crafting?**
Players have a random chance of getting either an Enchanted, Broken or Normal Tools and Armor

### **Dose this support older versions?**
Unfortunately, not yet it only supports 1.21+ you can help me contribute to this plugin on Github since I'm a fairly new to Minecraft Plugin Development

![Included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfcb7519687aac626d59032b7188c99fcbaff4cc.jpeg)
- Able to Enable or Disable the Plugin
- Able to Adjust the chances of the Broken and Enchanted items to apear
- Able to Adjust the messages to your liking
- Able to Enable or Disable the effect for armors, tools, bows crossbows, shields
- Able to Change Enchantments of any item
- Able to blacklist items from being effected
- Able to edit the durability percentage

### **List of Tools & Armor effected in the crafting menu**
- All Leather & Wooden Tools/Armor
- All Iron Tools & Armor
- All Gold Tools & Armor
- All Diamond Tools & Armor
- Shield
- Bows & Crossbows
- Wolf Armor
- Mace

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f230eea660b381720be2a32258aa2ea61229f4.jpeg)

Join our wonderful discord for support: https://wild-trails-development.gitbook.io/heroicstudios

## **Resource Rules:**
- You cannot resell this resource in anyway.
- You cannot claim this resource as yours.
